AI Arbitrage opportunity #ycombinator #yc #startups #aiagency
ranpaans86
Like Reply
createwithjai
11w
Either this or you have freelancers who create their own mini agencies and soak up higher profit margins, with less clients.
This is what I’m doing. If I can leverage to 3-5 clients across all roles, why would I go to an agency that often requires underpaying me to uphold profit margins.
Especially when many agencies don’t pay well enough (not saying yours doesn’t, idk that), and in reality they want people who prefer the illusion of job security and less responsibility
So agencies are going to have to settle for people with less knowledge or who require training
Because high performing freelancers can just do it by themselves now, or partner with other high performing freelancers and have a lean team where everyone gets paid well
Like Reply
